steps.title: Spot the procedural pattern
steps.content: The passage introduces the ebru process with "First" and "Next," clearly signaling a step-by-step procedure. The blank must complete this sequence with a transition to the final step.

steps.title: Match to the transition pattern
steps.content:
The logical relationship is sequence. The blank must introduce the third and final step of a procedure already marked by "First" and "Next."
  • "Nevertheless,": signals concession/contrast, so fails. ✗
  • "Therefore,": signals cause-effect, so fails — no cause is being stated. ✗
  • "Actually,": signals correction of a prior claim, so fails. ✗
  • "Finally,": signals the last step in a sequence, completing First → Next → Finally, so fits. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
